TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_innuite_a_tademaw, title = innuite_a_tademaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/innuite_a_tademaw} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == uheni malecad tu intian a tademaw, nika mautang tu adidi' namakayni i paylen abayu katukuh i amilika, innite a tademaw u sapaadih mihida u mungku a tademaw u wayway nuheni mahini u takuliyaway a tademaw mapuletay. sapiadu yadah ku nuheni, nikaukuwang makutay nu aydaay, nika u pacing usapiedap sapibuting, innuite a tademaw mibuting ku kawaw, mibuting tu magulu u tikpay ku sa pibuting ayda macakat tu u baluhay hidan u sapiunduu sipisetset nu kanatal. u cayay kalecad nu sapibuting, caay kalecad ku buting,sapacemut, salil, pubu, pacing, innuteatademaw i nuamisan akitidaan u lalud apuyu' nika miyalatu mulangaway I bayu a lutuk, nikaukakanen nuheni u titi atu buting, mahiniay a nikaudip nuhekal, ucacangdayan nu heni amaudip u haypau atu Kanata nu ngabulu idawhenay maudip, ubanges nu aadupan mala innute a tademaw sadikucan tu kasienawan u kapahay a sapidihing tu sienaw. . Uluma' nuheni, nukakawsan sa u nukuli sisangaan a cenga tatihepahan misaluma' tu nusuleda a luma'.nika, u suleda hananay a pangangan caykaw wini aca nu suleda a cenga ku tuduan a luma', u cacana amasahicahicaay, miadih tu puut nikasumad; lalud, innuite a tademaw ubanges nu niadupan malabadahung nu nisadabek; kasienawan ilabu nu seleda a cenga a luma nuba'tu atu lala' a luma'. . nudikuda sa nikasumad nu demiad, i 14 asiki u cikiw micumud tu kasisuldaan, namueneng i kelulan nu tipan a subal uinnuite a tademaw atu muenengay i nuwalian nu awcu a tayluk ataniay malimad mihica hakiya masasu ada, inayay ku sakalepacaw "inadikuda a kitidaan inayay ku liwaliwan aca nu innuite a tademaw nu lalangawan a cacanan, mala nu awcu aca nukaudip a daduducen, umilihidaay tayni a bunacadan pahabay naming tu mapuletay a katalan, imahini, innuite a tademaw nitucekan a dadan kanahatu ayda tucek a kawaw sa "nikatadikud a lalangawan" maadih ku hekal kiyu hinisa tu maudip, sadikuday u maudipay nu dikudan tu.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == uńß…ôni mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu intian a tad…ômaw, nika mautaŇč tu adidi Ē~ ° namakajni i pajr~…ĺ…ôn abaju katukuńß i amir~…ĺika, innit…ô a tad…ômaw u sapaadińß mińßida u muŇčku a tad…ômaw u wajwaj nuńß…ôni mańßini u takur~…ĺijawaj a tad…ômaw mapur~…ĺ…ôtaj. sapiadu jadańß ku nuńß…ôni, nikaukuwaŇč makutaj nu ajdaaj, nika u pa ¶iŇč usapi…ôdap sapibutiŇč, innuit…ô a tad…ômaw mibutiŇč ku kawaw, mibutiŇč tu magur~…ĺu u tikpaj ku sa pibutiŇč ajda ma ¶akat tu u bar~…ĺuńßaj ńßidan u sapiunduu sipis…ôts…ôt nu kanatar~…ĺ. u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sapibutiŇč, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku butiŇč,sapa ¶…ômut, sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, pubu, pa ¶iŇč, innut…ôatad…ômaw i nuamisan akitidaan u r~…ĺar~…ĺud apuju Ē~ ° nika mijar~…ĺatu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj i baju a r~…ĺutuk, nikaukakan…ôn nuńß…ôni u titi atu butiŇč, mańßiniaj a nikaudip nuńß…ôkar~…ĺ, u ¶a ¶aŇčdajan nu ńß…ôni amaudip u ńßajpau atu kanata nu Ňčabur~…ĺu idawńß…ônaj maudip, ubaŇč…ôs nu aadupan mar~…ĺa innut…ô a tad…ômaw sadiku ¶an tu kasi…ônawan u kapańßaj a sapidińßiŇč tu si…ônaw. . ur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, nukakawsan sa u nukur~…ĺi sisaŇčaan a ¶…ôŇča tatińß…ôpańßan misar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu nusur~…ĺ…ôda a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °.nika, u sur~…ĺ…ôda ńßananaj a paŇčaŇčan ¶ajkaw wini a ¶a nu sur~…ĺ…ôda a ¶…ôŇča ku tuduan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u ¶a ¶ana amasańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj, miadińß tu puut nikasumad; r~…ĺar~…ĺud, innuit…ô a tad…ômaw ubaŇč…ôs nu niadupan mar~…ĺabadańßuŇč nu nisadab…ôk; kasi…ônawan ir~…ĺabu nu s…ôr~…ĺ…ôda a ¶…ôŇča a r~…ĺuma nuba Ē~ °tu atu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. . nudikuda sa nikasumad nu d…ômiad, i ** asiki u ¶ikiw mi ¶umud tu kasisur~…ĺdaan, namu…ôn…ôŇč i k…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺan nu tipan a subar~…ĺ uinnuit…ô a tad…ômaw atu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i nuwar~…ĺian nu aw ¶u a tajr~…ĺuk ataniaj mar~…ĺimad mińßi ¶a ńßakija masasu ada, inajaj ku sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw "inadikuda a kitidaan inajaj ku r~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwan a ¶a nu innuit…ô a tad…ômaw nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a ¶a ¶anan, mar~…ĺa nu aw ¶u a ¶a nukaudip a dadudu ¶…ôn, umir~…ĺińßidaaj tajni a buna ¶adan pańßabaj namiŇč tu mapur~…ĺ…ôtaj a katar~…ĺan, imańßini, innuit…ô a tad…ômaw nitu ¶…ôkan a dadan kanańßatu ajda tu ¶…ôk a kawaw sa "nikatadikud a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan" maadińß ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ kiju ńßinisa tu maudip, sadikudaj u maudipaj nu dikudan tu.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == uheni malecad tu intian a tademaw, nika mautang tu adidi' namakayni i paylen abayu katukuh i amilika, innite a tademaw u sapaadih mihida u mungku a tademaw u wayway nuheni mahini u takuliyaway a tademaw mapuletay. sapiadu yadah ku nuheni, nikaukuwang makutay nu aydaay, nika u pacing usapiedap sapibuting, innuite a tademaw mibuting ku kawaw, mibuting tu magulu u tikpay ku sa pibuting ayda macakat tu u baluhay hidan u sapiunduu sipisetset nu kanatal. u cayay kalecad nu sapibuting, caay kalecad ku buting,sapacemut, salil, pubu, pacing, innuteatademaw i nuamisan akitidaan u lalud apuyu' nika miyalatu mulangaway I bayu a lutuk, nikaukakanen nuheni u titi atu buting, mahiniay a nikaudip nuhekal, ucacangdayan nu heni amaudip u haypau atu Kanata nu ngabulu idawhenay maudip, ubanges nu aadupan mala innute a tademaw sadikucan tu kasienawan u kapahay a sapidihing tu sienaw. . Uluma' nuheni, nukakawsan sa u nukuli sisangaan a cenga tatihepahan misaluma' tu nusuleda a luma'.nika, u suleda hananay a pangangan caykaw wini aca nu suleda a cenga ku tuduan a luma', u cacana amasahicahicaay, miadih tu puut nikasumad; lalud, innuite a tademaw ubanges nu niadupan malabadahung nu nisadabek; kasienawan ilabu nu seleda a cenga a luma nuba'tu atu lala' a luma'. . nudikuda sa nikasumad nu demiad, i 14 asiki u cikiw micumud tu kasisuldaan, namueneng i kelulan nu tipan a subal uinnuite a tademaw atu muenengay i nuwalian nu awcu a tayluk ataniay malimad mihica hakiya masasu ada, inayay ku sakalepacaw "inadikuda a kitidaan inayay ku liwaliwan aca nu innuite a tademaw nu lalangawan a cacanan, mala nu awcu aca nukaudip a daduducen, umilihidaay tayni a bunacadan pahabay naming tu mapuletay a katalan, imahini, innuite a tademaw nitucekan a dadan kanahatu ayda tucek a kawaw sa "nikatadikud a lalangawan" maadih ku hekal kiyu hinisa tu maudip, sadikuday u maudipay nu dikudan tu.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == uńß…ôni mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu intian a tad…ômaw, nika mautaŇč tu adidi Ē~ ° namakajni i pajr~…ĺ…ôn abaju katukuńß i amir~…ĺika, innit…ô a tad…ômaw u sapaadińß mińßida u muŇčku a tad…ômaw u wajwaj nuńß…ôni mańßini u takur~…ĺijawaj a tad…ômaw mapur~…ĺ…ôtaj. sapiadu jadańß ku nuńß…ôni, nikaukuwaŇč makutaj nu ajdaaj, nika u pa ¶iŇč usapi…ôdap sapibutiŇč, innuit…ô a tad…ômaw mibutiŇč ku kawaw, mibutiŇč tu magur~…ĺu u tikpaj ku sa pibutiŇč ajda ma ¶akat tu u bar~…ĺuńßaj ńßidan u sapiunduu sipis…ôts…ôt nu kanatar~…ĺ. u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sapibutiŇč, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku butiŇč,sapa ¶…ômut, sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, pubu, pa ¶iŇč, innut…ôatad…ômaw i nuamisan akitidaan u r~…ĺar~…ĺud apuju Ē~ ° nika mijar~…ĺatu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj i baju a r~…ĺutuk, nikaukakan…ôn nuńß…ôni u titi atu butiŇč, mańßiniaj a nikaudip nuńß…ôkar~…ĺ, u ¶a ¶aŇčdajan nu ńß…ôni amaudip u ńßajpau atu kanata nu Ňčabur~…ĺu idawńß…ônaj maudip, ubaŇč…ôs nu aadupan mar~…ĺa innut…ô a tad…ômaw sadiku ¶an tu kasi…ônawan u kapańßaj a sapidińßiŇč tu si…ônaw. . ur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, nukakawsan sa u nukur~…ĺi sisaŇčaan a ¶…ôŇča tatińß…ôpańßan misar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu nusur~…ĺ…ôda a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °.nika, u sur~…ĺ…ôda ńßananaj a paŇčaŇčan ¶ajkaw wini a ¶a nu sur~…ĺ…ôda a ¶…ôŇča ku tuduan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u ¶a ¶ana amasańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj, miadińß tu puut nikasumad; r~…ĺar~…ĺud, innuit…ô a tad…ômaw ubaŇč…ôs nu niadupan mar~…ĺabadańßuŇč nu nisadab…ôk; kasi…ônawan ir~…ĺabu nu s…ôr~…ĺ…ôda a ¶…ôŇča a r~…ĺuma nuba Ē~ °tu atu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. . nudikuda sa nikasumad nu d…ômiad, i ** asiki u ¶ikiw mi ¶umud tu kasisur~…ĺdaan, namu…ôn…ôŇč i k…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺan nu tipan a subar~…ĺ uinnuit…ô a tad…ômaw atu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i nuwar~…ĺian nu aw ¶u a tajr~…ĺuk ataniaj mar~…ĺimad mińßi ¶a ńßakija masasu ada, inajaj ku sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw "inadikuda a kitidaan inajaj ku r~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwan a ¶a nu innuit…ô a tad…ômaw nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a ¶a ¶anan, mar~…ĺa nu aw ¶u a ¶a nukaudip a dadudu ¶…ôn, umir~…ĺińßidaaj tajni a buna ¶adan pańßabaj namiŇč tu mapur~…ĺ…ôtaj a katar~…ĺan, imańßini, innuit…ô a tad…ômaw nitu ¶…ôkan a dadan kanańßatu ajda tu ¶…ôk a kawaw sa "nikatadikud a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan" maadińß ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ kiju ńßinisa tu maudip, sadikudaj u maudipaj nu dikudan tu.
